brand.name: WIZL
brand.slogan: Scan it. Know it. Track it.
brand.description: Discover what you got. Scan, track, and explore cannabis strains with AI.

age.question: Are you 20 or older?
age.note:
You must be of legal age to use WIZL.
Cannabis laws vary by location — know your local rules.
age.denied: Not yet, friend. Come back when you're older.
age.deniedNote: WIZL is only available for users 20+ years old.
age.legal: By entering you confirm you are of legal age in your jurisdiction. WIZL is an educational cannabis discovery tool.

home.aiScannerDesc: Snap a photo of the jar — get a beautiful strain card with effects, flavors, and community rating. Like magic.
home.proDesc: Unlimited scans, AI insights, full history, exclusive badges.
home.trialNote: 7 days free. Cancel anytime. You know the vibe.
